description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-file-upload` (T2-34). 3/6 libraries — healthcare: lab results, imaging, documents. NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-file-upload/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, accept types prop, multiple files, file list typing, size limits, upload progress typing
2. Accessibility — drag-and-drop zone has `role="region"` with label, keyboard alternative (button triggers file dialog), file list items removable with keyboard, error states announced via `aria-live`, upload progress has `aria-valuenow`, axe-core pass
3. Tests — drag-drop, click-to-browse, file type validation, size limit, multiple files, removal, upload simulation
4. Storybook — single/multiple, accept types, size limits, upload progress, error states
5. CSS — drag-over state, file list, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (no external upload library)
7. Drupal — wraps native file input, form-associated

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-file-upload/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-file-upload — T2-34 antagonistic quality review
